description_for_human: Multimodal clinical AI for dysphagia and 照護食 (care food) standard adoption in Hong Kong care settings.
description_for_model: CareEZ provides REST APIs for dysphagia-related clinical decision support. Use iddsi-classify to classify food/liquid texture by IDDSI level and 照護食 equivalent. Use voice-aspiration-screen for aspiration risk screening from voice descriptors. Use clinical-qa for clinical Q&A grounded in HKCSS 護食標準 and IDDSI. Use recipe-modify to adapt recipes to a target IDDSI texture level.

iddsi_classify.description: Classifies a food or liquid description by IDDSI level (0–7) and returns the corresponding 照護食/護食標準 equivalent. Input: {"text": "<food or liquid description>"}.

voice_aspiration_screen.description: Screens aspiration risk from a voice or swallowing-symptom description. Returns a risk level and recommended next steps. Input: {"description": "<symptom or voice quality description>"}.

clinical_qa.description: Answers clinical questions about dysphagia management, IDDSI levels, HKCSS 護食標準, and safe texture selection for care staff. Input: {"question": "<clinical question>", "locale": "en|zh-HK|zh-CN"}.

recipe_modify.description: Adapts a recipe to a target IDDSI texture level. Returns modified ingredients, preparation instructions, and thickener dosage if applicable. Input: {"recipe": "<recipe text>", "target_iddsi_level": 4}.
